base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of koopa_shell_idle — a character (minion) from 1985 super mario bros. Static shell (post-stomp, koopa retreated). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Static shell (post-stomp, koopa retreated); idle until kicked
